## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Procedure / boundaries improvement (`SKILL.md` body)
- [ ] Triggering / description tuning (`SKILL.md` frontmatter)
- [ ] Documentation (README, community files)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are focused and described clearly
- [ ] No machine-specific local paths or untruthful examples introduced
- [ ] Hard Boundaries in `SKILL.md` remain authoritative (no source-code edits)
- [ ] If triggering changed, I listed example prompts that should / should not activate the skill
